headline: Alma Mater Secures Star-Studded Athlete Investor Group Ahead of New Funding Round
summary: Alma Mater, a golf footwear startup, announced a new group of high-profile athlete investors on July 6, highlighting its growth as it prepares for its next fundraising round. The company...
